properties.business_description: Simulated Struts 1.x / JSP / JDBC application packaged as a WAR, using SQLite for the local demo database
properties.documented_constraint: Requires a javax.servlet container (Tomcat 9); Tomcat 10 (jakarta.servlet) will not run this WAR

properties.documented_intent: javax.servlet-era ActionServlet: the reason the README pins Tomcat 9 over Tomcat 10

properties.business_description: Resolves the JDBC URL with the override precedence documented in the README
Local demo database; regenerable from db/sql/003_reset_database.sql per db/runtime-data/README.md

properties.documented_override_order: -Dtaskdesk.db.url system property, then TASKDESK_DB_URL environment variable, then classpath taskdesk.properties

nodes.name: Runtime seed row semantics
unknowns: The SQLite schema is analyzed, but row contents and business meaning of seed records in the live database file were not read by the schema parser.

properties.flow_hypothesis: claim:taskdesk-readme:login-entry (documented login URL and demo users) plus the static route chain /login -> /tasks -> /taskDetail from struts-config forwards
